subcodes.first_line: O fruit of this tree! In truth thou art oppressed and grief-stricken, and thy sighs and lamentations are fully justified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثمره این شجره فی الحقیقه مظلومی و محزون و آنچه آه و فغان نماای حق داری
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
